name: Washington Real Estate Investment Trust
description: Washington Real Estate Investment Trust, also known as WashREIT, is a self-administered equity real estate investment trust that specializes in the ownership and operation of income-producing properties. Historically focused on the greater Washington, D.C. metropolitan area, the company has evolved into a multifamily-focused REIT, managing a significant portfolio of apartment homes across the D.C. metro and Southeast regions. Founded in 1960, it holds the distinction of being one of the oldest publicly traded REITs in the United States, providing investors with exposure to high-quality residential real estate assets located near major transportation and employment hubs.
